## Type of Change

<!-- Check all that apply -->

- [ ] `feat` — New feature (non-breaking, adds functionality)
- [ ] `fix` — Bug fix (non-breaking, fixes an issue)
- [ ] `refactor` — Code change with no functional difference
- [ ] `perf` — Performance improvement
- [ ] `docs` — Documentation only
- [ ] `test` — Tests only (no production code changes)
- [ ] `chore` — Build process, dependency updates, tooling
- [ ] `ci` — CI/CD configuration changes
- [ ] `breaking` — Breaking change (existing functionality is affected)

## Documentation

## Pre-Merge Checklist

- [ ] Code follows project conventions defined in `CLAUDE.md`
- [ ] Self-reviewed the full diff
- [ ] No `console.log`, debug statements, or commented-out code left in
- [ ] No hardcoded secrets, credentials, or environment-specific values
- [ ] New environment variables are documented in `README.md` and `.env.example`
- [ ] PR title follows Conventional Commits format: `type(scope): description`
